no: Must use Default version (component 0) for EET. BP-BGT Worldmap version causes EET install failure. Ensure you also install World Map after EET_End! I heard it was inspired by a cave in BG1 that seemed like it should be accessible but it wasn’t.
sum: The Stone of Askavar is a WeiDU-based mod for Totsc, Tutu, BGT and BGEE. This mod involves a main quest and several subquests. There are new items and areas as well as lots of new creatures to fight.

co.tp2n: Default version: areas connected by travel triggers
co.no: The Stone of Askavar: BG1 quest with a new dungeon.
co.scn: The Stone of Askavar for TotSC/Tutu/BGT/BGEE

co.tp2n: BP-BGT Worldmap version: all areas added to worldmap (requires BP-BGT Worldmap)
co.no: REMOVED. BGT-only worldmap component. Not available in EET.
co.scn: The Stone of Askavar for TotSC/Tutu/BGT/BGEE
